crime.value: Multiple poisoning deaths - several people die from apparent heart attacks after receiving threatening letters
crime.quote: Why would someone want to murder and innocent little girl?

victim.value: Multiple victims including an innocent little girl and others who received anonymous death threat letters
victim.quote: At exactly six o'clock on Thursday 9th November 1891, the world as you know it will end.

investigator.value: Katriona DeLeon, a female detective inspired by Sherlock Holmes, assisted by Arthur Strand
investigator.quote: I have a good idea. replied Katriona.

red_herring.value: Supernatural threat letter suggesting death at exactly six o'clock, masking actual poisoning method
red_herring.quote: At exactly six o'clock on Thursday 9th November 1891, the world as you know it will end. Enjoy your last day alive.

clue_fairness.value: Detective withholds deductions from reader - 'I have a good idea' but doesn't share reasoning
clue_fairness.quote: Davises died?' 'I have a good idea.' replied Katriona.

social_world.value: Victorian Yorkshire setting with London/countryside class dynamics and professional hierarchies
social_world.quote: I'm an accountant,' he replied. Katriona smiled to herself. Of course, you could hardly get more everyday

media_and_audience.value: Murder of innocent child creates community shock and questioning of motive
media_and_audience.quote: Why would someone want to murder and innocent little girl?

investigator_wound.value: Katriona compared to Sherlock Holmes, suggesting pressure to live up to legendary detective's reputation
investigator_wound.quote: I am sure that the day you meet Sherlock Holmes will be the day the Great Detective meets his match.
